kumano faces kakkazan // etching of kuma.name: Kumano Faces Kakkazan // Etching of Kumano
kumano faces kakkazan // etching of kuma.type_line: Enchantment — Saga // Enchantment Creature — Human Shaman

card_faces.name: Kumano Faces Kakkazan
card_faces.oracle_text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.)
I — This Saga deals 1 damage to each opponent and each planeswalker they control.
II — When you next cast a creature spell this turn, that creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.
III — Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control.

card_faces.name: Etching of Kumano
card_faces.oracle_text:
Haste
If a creature dealt damage this turn by a source you controlled would die, exile it instead.
card_faces.flavor_text: Many kami came to demand a secret he did not know, and every one of them fell.

nowhere to run.name: Nowhere to Run
nowhere to run.oracle_text:
Flash
When this enchantment enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
Creatures your opponents control can be the targets of spells and abilities as though they didn't have hexproof. Ward abilities of those creatures don't trigger.

ashiok, dream render.name: Ashiok, Dream Render
ashiok, dream render.oracle_text:
Spells and abilities your opponents control can't cause their controller to search their library.
−1: Target player mills four cards. Then exile each opponent's graveyard.

fatal push.name: Fatal Push
fatal push.oracle_text:
Destroy target creature if it has mana value 2 or less.
Revolt — Destroy that creature if it has mana value 4 or less instead if a permanent left the battlefield under your control this turn.

candy trail.name: Candy Trail
candy trail.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, scry 2.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life and draw a card.
candy trail.flavor_text:
"Look! Another one! Who cares what Mother said? We'll be home before she gets back."
—Daniela, Edgewall youth

knight of dusk's shadow.name: Knight of Dusk's Shadow
knight of dusk's shadow.oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Your opponents can't gain life.
{1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

deep-cavern bat.name: Deep-Cavern Bat
deep-cavern bat.oracle_text:
Flying, lifelink
When this creature enters, look at target opponent's hand. You may exile a nonland card from it until this creature leaves the battlefield.
deep-cavern bat.flavor_text: The first shriek locates the prey. The second immobilizes it.

gray merchant of asphodel.name: Gray Merchant of Asphodel
gray merchant of asphodel.oracle_text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses X life, where X is your devotion to black. You gain life equal to the life lost this way. (Each {B} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to black.)

cast down.name: Cast Down
cast down.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
cast down.flavor_text:
"We simply cannot tolerate a petty thief among the servants. I'm afraid I'll have to let you go."
—Rog, steward of House Rillyn

deadly dispute.name: Deadly Dispute
deadly dispute.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature.
Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
deadly dispute.flavor_text: "That's a pretty ring! Trade you my knife for it."

ravenous chupacabra.name: Ravenous Chupacabra
ravenous chupacabra.oracle_text: When this creature enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls.
ravenous chupacabra.flavor_text: Opening Orazca unleashed more horrors than just the Immortal Sun.

bandit's talent.name: Bandit's Talent
bandit's talent.oracle_text:
(Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)
When this Class enters, each opponent discards two cards unless they discard a nonland card.
{B}: Level 2
At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, if that player has one or fewer cards in hand, they lose 2 life.
{3}{B}: Level 3
At the beginning of your draw step, draw an additional card for each opponent who has one or fewer cards in hand.

back for seconds.name: Back for Seconds
back for seconds.oracle_text:
Bargain (You may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token as you cast this spell.)
Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. If this spell was bargained, you may put one of those cards with mana value 4 or less onto the battlefield instead of putting it into your hand.

many partings.name: Many Partings
many partings.oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
many partings.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
many partings.flavor_text:
"For you in all the lands of the West there will ever be a welcome, dearest friend."
—Aragorn

nadier's nightblade.name: Nadier's Nightblade
nadier's nightblade.oracle_text: Whenever a token you control leaves the battlefield, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
nadier's nightblade.flavor_text: Checking around every corner doesn't help if you forget to look up.

peregrin took.name: Peregrin Took
peregrin took.oracle_text:
If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional Food token are created instead. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
Sacrifice three Foods: Draw a card.
peregrin took.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
peregrin took.flavor_text: "Sam! Get breakfast ready for half-past nine!"

tamiyo's safekeeping.name: Tamiyo's Safekeeping
tamiyo's safekeeping.oracle_text: Target permanent you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. You gain 2 life. (A permanent with hexproof and indestructible can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control. Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
tamiyo's safekeeping.flavor_text: To keep the Reality Chip out of Jin-Gitaxias's hands, the Wanderer entrusted it to Tamiyo.

anoint with affliction.name: Anoint with Affliction

Exile target creature if it has mana value 3 or less.
